title: GoldenForge-Fixes
description: Compatibility fix between mods and GoldenForge
body:
This mod include fixes for mods when using GoldenForge.

# What is GoldenForge ? 
Goldenforge is an unofficial fork of Forge designed to improve performance of large-scale modded servers by implementing Paper performance patches.

you can find more infos [here](https://github.com/GoldenForge/GoldenForge)
